ul.li: 1 scalar add (addss) vs hadd_ps: 2 horizontal adds each with 3-5 cycle latency. Shuffle+add uses different execution ports → better ILP.

div.p: Goal: Compute s0 + s1 + s2 + s3 Four partial sums need to be combined into one scalar.

ul.li: From v[0],v[1] → positions 2,3 Lanes cross: high↔low

div.p: 4 parallel additions! Lanes 0,2 are identical Lanes 1,3 are identical Progress: pairs summed
movehl extracts upper half of sums into lower half. Now lanes 0,1 hold what was in lanes 2,3.
_mm_add_ss adds only lane 0 (scalar add). Result: single scalar s0 + s1 + s2 + s3
